titles.title: We Want to See Jesus Lifted High

authors.author: Doug Horley
Doug Horley
Wir wollen dich hoch erhoben sehn

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We want to see Jesus lifted high A banner that flies across this land That all men might see the truth know He is the way to heaven

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We want to see, we want to see We want to see Jesus lifted high We want to see, we want to see We want to see Jesus lifted high

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Step by step we moving forward Little by little taking ground Every prayer a powerful weapon Strongholds come tumbling down And down and down and down

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We gonna see, we gonna see We gonna see Jesus lifted high We gonna see, we gonna see We gonna see Jesus lifted high
